name: Americanized Chicken Shop Suey
recipeIngredient: 2 Whole Boneless Skinless Chicken Breast Halves
1 Can (5 oz) Water Chestnuts, drained and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into strips that are about 2 inches long and 1/2 inch thick.
2. Place the chicken in a slow cooking pot with salt, ginger, celery, water chestnuts, onion, bouillon, and soy sauce.
3. Cover and cook on low for 5-6 hours.
4. Turn the control to high. Add mushrooms and bean sprouts.
5. Cover and cook on high for 15 minutes.
6. Serve over hot rice and sprinkle with almonds.
7. Serve with extra soy sauce if desired.
Makes 4-6 servings.
